codeReview.summary: Current HEAD satisfies the feature contract. Commit d8800eb adds a seeded-network guard to the network-scoped onchain dex and pool routes, so `/onchain/networks/not-a-network/dexes` now returns the existing `{ error, message }` 404 envelope before any `buildLiveOnchainCatalog()` DeFiLlama work. The change is narrowly scoped to invalid network requests and does not weaken live behavior for valid networks.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, onchain-api-worker skill, commit d8800eb, and current HEAD route/test code. The implementation removes the slow live-fetch path for the unknown-network negative case by short-circuiting against seeded onchain networks first, preserves the 404 envelope, and leaves valid-network live catalog behavior intact.
